title: French Stir Fry with Plant-Based Sauce
description: A French-inspired stir fry dish using a plant-based sauce, perfect for a quick and easy meal.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of sesame oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the grated ginger and minced garlic and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the Japanese broccoli and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes, or until tender.
In a small bowl, whisk together the plant-based sauce and sour cream (if using).
Pour the sauce over the broccoli and stir-fry for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the gooey honey (if using) and stir-fry for another minute.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped green onions (if desired).
